svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"><diagram id="dataflow" name="Data flow"><mxGraphModel dx="800" dy="700" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="760" pageHeight="690" math="0" shadow="0"><root><mxCell id="0"/><mxCell id="1" parent="0"/><mxCell id="start" value="raw images + platemap.csv" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=12;verticalAlign=middle;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="230" y="20" width="260" height="44" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="cp_l" value="CellProfiler
QC → illum → analysis
→ per-cell measurements (SQLite)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;verticalAlign=middle;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="65" y="120" width="250" height="64" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="cp_r" value="CellProfiler
nuclei segmentation only" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;verticalAlign=middle;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="445" y="120" width="250" height="64" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="bridge" value="cytopipe bridge
→ DeepProfiler locations + index" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;verticalAlign=middle;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="445" y="224" width="250" height="54" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="deep" value="DeepProfiler (deep learning)
→ single-cell embeddings (.npz)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=12;verticalAlign=middle;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="445" y="308" width="250" height="54" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="conv_l" value="cytopipe convert
→ single-cell parquet" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;verticalAlign=middle;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="65" y="402" width="250" height="54" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="conv_r" value="cytopipe convert
→ single-cell parquet" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;verticalAlign=middle;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="445" y="402" width="250" height="54" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="pcy_l" value="pycytominer
aggregate → annotate → normalize
→ feature-select → consensus" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=12;verticalAlign=middle;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="65" y="496" width="250" height="78" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="pcy_r" value="pycytominer
aggregate → normalize
→ consensus" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=12;verticalAlign=middle;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="445" y="496" width="250" height="64" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="end" value="well- and consensus-level
feature profiles" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=12;verticalAlign=middle;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="210" y="614" width="300" height="44" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e0" value="--pipeline cellprofiler" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#4d4d4d;" edge="1" parent="1" source="start" target="cp_l"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e1" value="--pipeline deepprofiler" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#4d4d4d;" edge="1" parent="1" source="start" target="cp_r"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e2" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#4d4d4d;" edge="1" parent="1" source="cp_l" target="conv_l"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e3" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#4d4d4d;" edge="1" parent="1" source="cp_r" target="bridge"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e4" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#4d4d4d;" edge="1" parent="1" source="bridge" target="deep"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e5" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#4d4d4d;" edge="1" parent="1" source="deep" target="conv_r"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e6" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#4d4d4d;" edge="1" parent="1" source="conv_l" target="pcy_l"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e7" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#4d4d4d;" edge="1" parent="1" source="conv_r" target="pcy_r"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e8" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#4d4d4d;" edge="1" parent="1" source="pcy_l" target="end"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e9" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#4d4d4d;" edge="1" parent="1" source="pcy_r" target="end"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel></diagram></mxfile>
